rationale: The implementation faithfully meets all Task 4a requirements within the frozen scope. The closed inventories in `inventory.mjs` exactly match the normative frozen tables and AM-40 package exclusions. `util.mjs` correctly centralizes the shared lexical scanner, the D33 closure resolver, the D21 physical-containment logic, and the D26/D29 counted-iterator logic. `git.mjs` and `code.mjs` strictly implement their respective deterministic extraction rules without overstepping. Tests comprehensively assert exact derivation, accounting accuracy, and failure modes.
